title: GuoTonG 52.5ft/16m Plugin Rope Lights,576Daylight White LEDs,220V, 2 Wires, Waterproof, Connectable, Power Plug Built-in Fuse Design, Indoor/Outdoor Use, Ideal for Backyards, Decorative Lighting
features: Power plug built-in fuse design, more safe and reliable. These LED ropes contain 900 SMD F3 LEDs with a 1.2 inch pitch. Best choice for decorating the ceiling, lawn, pool, house outline, bedroom, living room, pergola and more.
Thick transparent round plastic tube, strong flexibility, heat-resistant, anti UV, energy-saving,durable and connectable.
Waterproof: IP65 grade PVC coating allows it to withstand extreme external conditions (rain, snow, pressure, impact, etc.) Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
Only can be cut once, according to the marks on length of every 2 meters, do not destroy the rest part, It's easy to operate. Can be easily bent into different shapes
12 months worriless warranty, free replacement or full refund.Wonderful lighting and decorating for indoor and outdoor .
description: Product Description GuoTonG 52.5ft/16m Plugin Rope Lights(Daylight White) These Daylight White rope lights are extra bright and connectable,perfectly suit for Christmas and year-round use. Specifications: Color: Daylight White Color Temperature: 6000 K Size of LEDs: F3 LEDs Length of a strip: 16m / 52.5ft LED Bulbs Spacing: 0.83 inch apart Quantity of LEDs : 576 Light Output (Lumen): 1420.28 lm Working Voltage: 220V AC Lifetime: 50,000+ hours Waterproof: Yes Diameter: 0.4in / 10mm Power Plug: With fuses inside , More safe and Reliable Light Tube : Clear ,Green-Friendly, Heavy Duty PVC Usage Range: Indoor and Outdoor High-quality LED Rope Tube Light GuoTonG is a company specializing in lighting design and production of high-quality lighting appliances.The company slogan is A WISDOM IN EACH LIGHTS Package Include: 1x User Manual 1x LED rope light 1x Waterproof glue 1x 220V 8A Cable plugs 1x Installation accessories package GuoTonG 52.5ft/16m 220V Daylight White Bright Rope Light Flexible and Durable Easy to install, make your home decoration more festive and lively Durable, heavy duty, thick, clear plastic tube cover bright 576 LEDs 52.5ft is enough long to decorate your home and outdoor lighting ,like living room, bedroom , dining room, indoor stairs and garden, Outdoor corridors, courtyards, balconies. The light strip can be cut. When cutting, it can only be cut once according to the scissors mark on the light strip. After cutting into 2 pieces, please use glue to seal the fracture and cover with a small cap. Feature: Waterproof IP65 means that the dust-proof grade is 6, which completely prevents dust from entering; The waterproof grade is 5, which means that it can be used outdoors in rain.Rainproof, but do not immerse it underwater. Connectable The light strips can be connected, the length of which can be connected end to end up to 157.5ft, can decorate the entire area or a certain building Bright Enough The daylight white rope light color temperature is 6000K.With 1420+lm lighting output and 576 LEDs,makes the building more eye catching and unique.
